title: Lets look at the Different Lilim
display_title: Lets look at the Different Lilim
wikitext:
[]: Lets look at the Different Lilim Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Nov 06, 2008 12:21 am Alright, so first I did a study on a Lilim with an S2 Organ and the tread did pretty nicely. Now I wish to look into the different sexes of Lilim and how they differ. I'll start.. Who has the stronger ATF, I feel myself that it is the Female kind. They seem to hide more and build up more but maybe I am wrong. I guess it really depends on the Lilim itself. The Adam got the FoL and we got the FoK, now think. Males kinda got something like a fruit of -cant think of anything yet- and the females got sort of a fruit of creation since they can create another Lilim inside themselves. I'm just trying to find things to talk about..

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Nov 06, 2008 1:13 am Females can manipulate their AT fields, which allows them to convey their emotions more and relate to other Lilin. Males have more of a barrier AT field, more along the lines of a wall against other AT fields, thus have less emotional manipulation than females. However, both males and females can have the AT field properties swapped depending on certain circumstances.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Nov 06, 2008 9:51 am Lilim are generally all the same. Unless you're Rei or Kaworu, no one has SPESHUL AT POWERS or special Fruits and/or DNA and/or S2 Organs.

[]: Post by Axell » Thu Nov 06, 2008 1:10 pm silly thread is silly

[]: Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Nov 06, 2008 2:40 pm Silly tread is silly but I thought maybe it would get people talking. I mean, there has been more "silly" things when it comes to Eva.

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 06, 2008 3:35 pm Threads that are made for the sake of it tend to lack so much intrinsic purpose, they're better at getting locked than generating new discussion.

[]: Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Nov 06, 2008 5:10 pm I understand, you cant blame a guy for trying. I thought maybe someone would take this up and start a good discussion about it like the thread with the S2 organ. Well I tried

[]: Post by rberlin » Thu Nov 13, 2008 11:21 pm Well why was Rei's AT Field stronger than Kaworu's? If the AT Field is just the "light of the soul," and Kaworu and Rei have Adam and Lilith's souls respectively, does that mean that Lilith is the more powerful being? All else equal you would think Rei and Kaworu would be evenly matched.

[]: Post by Sachi » Thu Nov 13, 2008 11:28 pm rberlin wrote: Well why was Rei's AT Field stronger than Kaworu's? If the AT Field is just the "light of the soul," and Kaworu and Rei have Adam and Lilith's souls respectively, does that mean that Lilith is the more powerful being? All else equal you would think Rei and Kaworu would be evenly matched.

[]: Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Thu Nov 13, 2008 11:49 pm i think it entirely depends on the person.

[]: Post by rberlin » Fri Nov 14, 2008 12:24 am Yeah they did. Kaworu had the strongest AT Field ever recorded, until Rei dissolved it. At least that's what Lt. Hyuga said.

[]: Post by Sachi » Fri Nov 14, 2008 12:36 am rberlin wrote: Yeah they did. Kaworu had the strongest AT Field ever recorded, until Rei dissolved it. At least that's what Lt. Hyuga said.

[]: Post by rberlin » Fri Nov 14, 2008 12:44 am Meh, I don't know why I thought he said it was stronger than Kaworu's. Anyway, I would think they were equal, but it just seems like they're alluding to Rei being superior to Kaworu.

[]: Post by zlink64 » Thu Nov 20, 2008 12:34 pm well isn't kauro clone of a angel and Rei like clone of a god correct me if im wrong

[]: Post by Sachi » Thu Nov 20, 2008 7:17 pm zlink64 wrote: well isn't kauro clone of a angel and Rei like clone of a god correct me if im wrong

[]: Post by AyrYntake » Mon Nov 24, 2008 11:43 am Only until now has this thread begun to get some meaning/coherence. I posted a thread ages ago that has some pertinent points, although this went off on a tangent several pages in. Anyway the shape and strength of your personal AT Field is all to do with your personality and the way you handle your emotions. That's basically the gist of it. More in-depth stuff about this will need a psychologist's advice.

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 24, 2008 12:04 pm Sachi_13 wrote: Kaworu** and Rei are clones of the two Seeds of Life; Adam and Lilith.

[]: Post by Sachi » Mon Nov 24, 2008 7:21 pm Reichu wrote: Rei = Lilith's soul + pallet-swapped clone of Yui Kaworu = Adam's soul + either (1) pallet-swapped clone of Adam CE donor or (2) freakish hybrid bastard child of Adam and the donor that ended up looking like a Lilin for some reason

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 24, 2008 7:28 pm No no, not close enough. Completely different. Accept no substitutes. ;p

[]: Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon Nov 24, 2008 10:22 pm As much as I love seeing people posting in my treads, we should lock this cause I don't know if any more can be posted on it. I mean if you have a legit post then by all means post ^_-
